definitions.definition: A person who undertakes and manages a business or enterprise with the aim of earning profit. He bears all the risks and responsibilities of the business.
Any activity undertaken for profit or gain. It may be a small or a large-scale activity.
An individual or a group of individuals who own the business. They have the right to claim the assets of the business.
The amount of money invested in the business by the owners. It is used to finance the business operations.
The possibility of loss or injury that a business may face. It can be financial, social, or environmental.
The excess of revenue over the cost. It is the reward for the business and the owners.
A business that is undertaken by an individual or a group of individuals. It may be a small or a large-scale activity.
A form of business organization where a single individual owns and operates the business. The owner has complete control over the business.
A form of business organization where two or more individuals own and operate the business together. They share the profits and losses.
A form of business organization where the ownership is divided into shares. The shareholders have limited liability.
A unit of ownership in a joint stock company. The shareholders have the right to claim a proportion of the company's assets.
An individual or a group of individuals who own shares in a joint stock company. They have the right to claim a proportion of the company's assets.
A characteristic of a joint stock company where the liability of the shareholders is limited to the amount of their investment.

definitions.example: E.g., registering a business with the Registrar of Companies
definitions.definition: The process of officially recording a business with the government. It is a requirement for most businesses.
A business that is registered with the government and has a separate legal existence from its owners.

definitions.example: E.g., the Board of Directors of Infosys Ltd.
definitions.definition: A group of individuals who are responsible for managing a company. They make strategic decisions and oversee the company's operations.

definitions.example: E.g., the CEO of Infosys Ltd.
definitions.definition: An individual who is responsible for managing a company or a department. They are responsible for implementing the company's policies and strategies.
